name: Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the raisins in a small amount of flour, then sift the dry ingredients together and add the raisins and cereal.
2. Beat the egg slightly, then add the buttermilk and melted shortening. Blend well with the first mixture; do not overmix.
3. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
Note: Type of cereal not given. Corn or bran could probably be used.
